user.title: Set up BackupCheckup
user.description: Choose a ready-to-use monitoring profile. You can change it later in the integration options.

data_description.monitoring_profile: Standard is simple and suitable for most installations. Secure expects a second storage location. Custom shows all settings.

advanced.title: Custom monitoring settings
advanced.description: Set your own limits. Automatic size checking compares the newest backup with recent backups.

data.minimum_backup_size_mb: Fixed minimum backup size in MB
data.maximum_size_drop_percent: Maximum allowed size drop in percent

data_description.max_age_days: A warning is shown after this many complete days.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often BackupCheckup reads the Home Assistant backup inventory.
data_description.size_check_mode: Automatic is recommended for users who do not know their normal backup size.
data_description.minimum_backup_size_mb: Only used with the fixed minimum size mode.
data_description.maximum_size_drop_percent: Used for automatic comparison with previous backups.
data_description.minimum_redundant_locations: Use 1 for one storage location or 2 for local storage plus NAS/cloud.
data_description.repair_issues_enabled: Create Home Assistant Repair issues for active backup problems. Issues disappear automatically after the problem is resolved.
data_description.analytics_window_days: Backup statistics and the observed automatic-backup success rate use this period. Historical success tracking starts with version 1.5.0.
data_description.auto_verify_new_backups: After a new newest backup is detected, download and fully verify it once. This can use considerable network, CPU and temporary disk space.
data_description.database_integrity_check: Temporarily extracts the included SQLite database and runs PRAGMA integrity_check. This makes verification slower and uses additional temporary disk space.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one BackupCheckup instance is allowed.

error.fixed_size_required: Enter a minimum backup size greater than 0 MB when using the fixed minimum size mode.

init.title: BackupCheckup options
init.description: Choose a monitoring profile. Selecting Custom opens all individual settings.

error.fixed_size_required: Enter a minimum backup size greater than 0 MB when using the fixed minimum size mode.

state.check_backup_size: Check backup size and free space
state.add_storage_location: Add or restore a backup location
state.replace_backup: Replace or recreate the affected backup

no_backup.title: No backup is available
no_backup.description: BackupCheckup could not find any stored backup. Open Home Assistant backup settings and create a backup.

backup_stale.title: Latest backup is too old
backup_stale.description: The latest backup is {age} days old. The configured maximum is {maximum} days. Create a new backup and check the automatic schedule.

automatic_backup_overdue.title: Automatic backup is overdue
automatic_backup_overdue.description: The latest automatic backup is {age} days old. The configured maximum is {maximum} days. Check the automatic backup schedule.

automatic_backup_failed.title: Last automatic backup failed
automatic_backup_failed.description: The last automatic attempt was {attempt}, while the last successful automatic backup was {success}. Check the Home Assistant backup log and storage locations.

automatic_schedule_missing.title: Automatic backup schedule is missing
automatic_schedule_missing.description: Home Assistant does not currently report a next scheduled automatic backup. Configure or enable automatic backups.

automatic_schedule_overdue.title: Automatic backup schedule is overdue
automatic_schedule_overdue.description: The next automatic backup was reported as {scheduled}, which is already in the past. Check the automatic backup configuration.

manager_unavailable.title: Backup manager is unavailable
manager_unavailable.description: The Home Assistant backup manager currently reports the state “{state}”. Restart or check the native Backup integration.

storage_error.title: Backup storage location has an error
storage_error.description: Home Assistant reported an error for these backup storage locations: {locations}. Check their connection, credentials and available space.

backup_size_suspicious.title: Latest backup size is suspicious
backup_size_suspicious.description: The latest backup is {size} and changed by {change} compared with the previous comparable backup. The configured warning threshold is {threshold}%.

latest_backup_incomplete.title: Latest backup is incomplete
latest_backup_incomplete.description: The latest backup contains failed components. Add-ons: {addons}. Folders: {folders}. Storage locations: {locations}. Check the backup log and create a new backup.

backup_not_redundant.title: Backup is not stored redundantly
backup_not_redundant.description: The latest backup is available on {current} storage location(s), but {required} are required. Add or restore another backup location.

backup_integrity_failed.title: Backup is corrupt or unreadable
backup_integrity_failed.description: The full integrity check of the backup copy on {location} failed at {checked}. Create a new backup and verify it before relying on the affected copy.
